description_long: This is a modern, geometric shelving unit with a distinctive stepped design, featuring three open rectangular compartments of varying sizes. The structure is composed of flat, straight panels with sharp right angles, creating a visually striking and functional piece. The surfaces are uniformly colored in a matte brown finish, suggesting a wood or laminate material. The open design allows for easy access from the front and sides, making it suitable for displaying or storing items in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or communal spaces. The shelves are thick and robust, indicating the ability to support moderate weights. There are no visible doors, handles, or glass panels, emphasizing its minimalist and utilitarian style.
description: A modern, stepped brown shelving unit with three open rectangular compartments and a matte finish. Its geometric design and sturdy build make it ideal for display or storage in urban settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the stepped profile and depth of the three open compartments.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open faces of all three shelves and the overall geometric layout.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the stepped profile, with clear visibility of the shelf depths.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back panels and the alignment of the shelves without visible openings.
